theme_and_archetype.name: Archetype 4: Swiss & High-Contrast (Light Theme)
theme_and_archetype.rationale: Enterprise Admin Dashboard for Konnectify. Requires high density, absolute clarity, and functional beauty. The primary brand color is Green, driving a clean, objective, and authoritative 'Control Room' aesthetic.

headings.instruction: Replace Inter for headings. Use tracking-tight (-0.02em) for all titles. H1 (Tab Title) should be text-3xl font-semibold. Card Titles should be text-sm font-medium uppercase tracking-[0.05em] (Overline style).

body.instruction: Use for standard text, descriptions, and table data.

numbers_and_data.instruction: CRITICAL: All KPI values, chart axes, dates, and deltas MUST use Geist Mono for tabular alignment and a technical 'iPaaS' feel.

brand.primary: Konnectify Green (#10B981 or similar). Use sparingly for active states, selected toggles, and 'Successful' metrics.

semantics.danger: text-rose-600 bg-rose-50 (Used for Failed tasks; inverse logic applied here)

spacing_and_grid.card_padding: p-5 or p-6 (generous internal breathing room)
spacing_and_grid.radii: rounded-lg (max 8px, keeping edges relatively sharp to maintain Swiss/Technical feel)

header_and_controls.layout: Flex container with Title + Live Indicator on left, and Control Group on right.
header_and_controls.live_indicator: Small green pulsing dot (animate-pulse) next to a 'Live' label in Geist Mono.
header_and_controls.year_stepper: Styled as '‹ YEAR 2026 ›'. Use ghost buttons for arrows, Geist Mono for the text. Add hover:bg-slate-100.
header_and_controls.period_toggle: Shadcn Tabs list styled as a segmented control (h-9, bg-slate-100, p-1 rounded-md).
header_and_controls.module_filter: Select dropdown with clean 1px border. Default: 'All Modules'.

kpi_cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm rounded-lg hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200.
kpi_cards.layout: Top row: Overline title + subtle icon. Middle: Large Geist Mono value (text-3xl font-semibold). Bottom: Delta badge.
kpi_cards.delta_treatment: Small pill badge (px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium). Inverse semantics for Failed tasks (Red is bad/up, Green is good/down).

main_chart_card.header: Flex between title/subtitle and Graph/Table segmented toggle.

recharts_styling.lines: strokeWidth={2}, activeDot={{ r: 6, strokeWidth: 0 }}. No dots on resting state for clean look.
recharts_styling.axes: tick={{ fill: '#64748B', fontSize: 12, fontFamily: 'Geist Mono' }} axisLine={false} tickLine={false}
recharts_styling.tooltip: Custom glassmorphism tooltip: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/90 border border-slate-200 shadow-lg p-3 rounded-lg.

main_chart_card.legend: Interactive legend. Hovering a legend item lowers opacity of other lines. Clicking toggles visibility.
main_chart_card.table_view: When toggled, show Shadcn Table. border-collapse, text-sm, hover:bg-slate-50 on rows. Right-align numeric columns.

distribution_donut.style: Recharts PieChart with innerRadius={60} outerRadius={80} paddingAngle={2}. Custom active shape on hover.
distribution_donut.legend: Vertical list below donut. Color dot + Label + % + Raw Value.

performance_list.style: List of modules. For each: Name, Success Rate bar (bg-slate-100 with inner bg-emerald-500 fill), and Delta. Compact spacing (gap-3).

module_summary_table.style: Standard Shadcn Table. Use Geist Mono for all metric columns. Right-align numeric data. Sticky header if tall.

motion_and_microinteractions.hover_states: All buttons, rows, and legend items must have a 0.2s ease transition.
motion_and_microinteractions.entrance_animation: Stagger KPI cards on mount (translate-y-2 to 0, opacity 0 to 1).
motion_and_microinteractions.chart_interactions: Smooth line drawing animation on mount. Synchronized Tooltips.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text, especially muted/secondary text, passes APCA contrast. No grey-on-grey. Use Slate-500 minimum against white.
